---
title: Declaration of author contributions - PhD thesis Jean-Bob Delatourte
csl: apa-old-doi-prefix.csl
format:
    pdf: default
    docx:
        number-sections: true
filters:
  - multibib
  - bold-author
bold-auth-name:
  - family: Delatourte
    given: J.-B.
bibliography:
  papers: phd_papers.bib
nocite: |
  @*
validate-yaml: false
execute:
  echo: false
---

\phantomsection
# Publications included in the thesis {.unnumbered}

::: {#refs-papers}
:::

<!-- \newpage -->
\phantomsection
# Authors contributions {.unnumbered}

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

my_packages <- c(
    "knitr",
    "targets"
)

lapply(my_packages, library, character.only = TRUE)


authors_tbl <- tar_read(contrib_tbl)

```

```{r}
#| results: asis
#| tbl-colwidths: [30, 30, 30]

options(knitr.kable.NA = '')
kable(authors_tbl)
```

\vspace{0.5cm}

Bergen, \today

\vspace{0.8cm}

Supervisor
\hspace{1.5cm}
Supervisor
\hspace{1.5cm}
Supervisor
